Cartly.Api.Integration.Facebook.Data.Pho.description:
Indicates the phone number's one-time password (OTP) verification status.
Values can be NOT_VERIFIED, VERIFIED, or EXPIRED. Only phone numbers with a VERIFIED status can be registered.

amount.description: Ignored if either ProductVariantId or SubscriptionId is provided

rankId.description: null - do nothing, Guid.Empty - unset, Guid - set
null - do nothing, Guid.Empty - unset, Guid - set

allDnsRecords.description: null in case of an unsuccessful import

redirectUrl.description: For internal use. Use ActualRedirectUrl to redirect
